creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 256660
Created, mounted, then upgraded boot environment 1500030-015-ports

Not reproducible following an upgrade with the FreeBSD-ports repo using latest on CURRENT. 

From my record of the upgrade, for boot environment '1500030-015-ports': 


root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # grep 36595 /var/log/messages | wc -l
      62
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # grep 36595 /var/log/messages 
…
Jan 12 11:28:03 mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd pkg[36595]: qt6-webengine upgraded: 6.7.3_3 -> 6.8.1 
…
Jan 12 11:30:55 mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd pkg[36595]: py311-qt6-webengine upgraded: 6.7.0_1 -> 6.8.0 
…
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # 


<https://www.freshports.org/www/qt6-webengine/#history>
<https://www.freshports.org/www/py-qt6-webengine/#history>
